signal.title: Google launches Gemini Ads Studio
signal.summary: Google introduced an AI-powered creative and campaign platform designed to help advertisers generate, test, and optimize ads at scale.

agency_strategist.label: Agency Strategist
agency_strategist.whyItMatters: Creative production costs are about to fall for mid-market brands. Agencies that package workflow transformation rather than asset production will win.
agency_strategist.now: Review creative production workflows with key clients.
agency_strategist.next: Build an AI content testing framework for Q3 campaigns.
agency_strategist.later: Develop AI creative governance and brand safety processes.
agency_strategist.watchout: Clients may overestimate output quality and underestimate review needs.

executive_strategy.label: Executive Strategy
executive_strategy.whyItMatters: AI creative platforms may shift budget allocation from manual production toward workflow systems, governance, and experimentation infrastructure.
executive_strategy.now: Assess exposure across agency and brand production workflows.
executive_strategy.next: Review AI infrastructure and data strategy investments.
executive_strategy.later: Anticipate margin pressure on traditional production services.
executive_strategy.watchout: Enterprise adoption will depend on compliance, brand safety, and measurable ROI.

adtech_gtm.label: AdTech & GTM
adtech_gtm.whyItMatters: New AI creative infrastructure creates opportunities for measurement, workflow orchestration, compliance, and platform integrations.
adtech_gtm.now: Identify product gaps around creative QA and workflow handoff.
adtech_gtm.next: Build sales narratives around platform disruption.
adtech_gtm.later: Explore partnerships with AI creative and media platforms.
adtech_gtm.watchout: Platform-native tools may compress standalone vendor differentiation.

responsible_ai_policy.label: Responsible AI & Policy
responsible_ai_policy.whyItMatters: AI-generated ad creative raises new questions around provenance, disclosure, rights, claims, and brand safety.
responsible_ai_policy.now: Review disclosure and approval requirements for AI-generated assets.
responsible_ai_policy.next: Define provenance standards for creative workflows.
responsible_ai_policy.later: Monitor policy and regulatory guidance on AI-generated advertising.
responsible_ai_policy.watchout: Undisclosed or unsupported claims could create legal and reputational risk.

disclosure: Produced by Ada · Reviewed by Rachel · Sources available
